jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at EaseMyTrip
jsonLd.description:
EaseMyTrip invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About EaseMyTrip:
EaseMyTrip is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip!
